voters.name: Nate
voters.comment: Love Daði

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: This was so cute and fun!

voters.name: Mike
voters.comment: I like your weird guy.

voters.name: Sarah
voters.comment: I wasn't sure about this one at first but +1 for having me dancing at the kitchen while making dinner

voters.name: Dorothy
voters.comment: I do like how playful this song was

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: I really dig this guy's vibe. It also sounds like he's constantly on the verge of a sneeze for the first part of the song.

voters.name: Nate
voters.comment: Pour one out for the unofficial winner of eurovision 2020.

voters.name: Mike
voters.comment: The fact that this is literally about a baby makes it so much better.

voters.name: Sarah
voters.comment: This is so so good

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: Definite earworm. I like your funky man and would give this more points if I had them!

voters.name: Nate
voters.comment: The unofficial winners of Eurovision 2020, love some funky Daði.

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: Mike: "Oh this must be the made up language song."Me: "No dude, this is Icelandic"I can't believe I didn't think about Sticks and Stones by Jónsi for this one, now that I think about it! But tbf a lot of that was in English. Still, loved how funky this was.
